articles.title: Apple unveils new accessibility features, and updates with Apple Intelligence - Apple
articles.description: Apple announced major accessibility updates powered by Apple Intelligence, including new capabilities for VoiceOver, Magnifier, and Voice Control.

articles.title: At last, The Bullet Heaven genre - popularised by hits like Vampire Survivors - has been sanctioned by Steam - Eurogamer
articles.description: This update has introduced a variety of new game tags for different genres, which should help categorize upcoming genres.

articles.title: Xbox Player Voice requests reveal what fans want most from Microsoft - TrueAchievements
articles.description: Xbox fans have wasted no time in submitting feedback to Microsoft with the new Xbox Player Voice portal. Here are the top 10 requests from players.

articles.title: Gemini is in danger of going full Copilot - The Verge
articles.description: Google is getting ready to launch more Gemini features at I/O 2026. Let’s hope the company learned from Microsoft’s Copilot mistakes.

articles.title: Nintendo has just announced Wario Ware-like game Pictonico! for mobile phones, and it looks absolutely bonkers - Eurogamer
articles.description: Nintendo's latest surprise announcement is Pictonico! for mobile phones, a Wario Ware-inspired game that's free to start playing but comes with DLC packs.

articles.title: Patch Notes 1.29.0 - ARC Raiders
articles.description: ARC Raiders is a multiplayer extraction adventure, set in a lethal future earth, ravaged by a mysterious mechanized threat known as ARC.
